title: Detect Log Bursts
description:
Each line is a Unix timestamp (integer). Group timestamps into 1-minute windows (window_start = timestamp // 60 * 60). Return windows where count > 3, one per line as `window_start count`, sorted by window_start ascending.

Return an empty string if no windows exceed the threshold.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: One burst window
